auth.sign_in_subtitle: Sign in to continue to POS Admin.
auth.session_expired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.generic_error: We could not sign you in. Please try again.
auth.rate_limited: Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.

two_factor.title: Two-step verification
two_factor.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to finish signing in.
two_factor.subtitle_recovery: Enter one of your one-time recovery codes to finish signing in.
two_factor.invalid_code: The provided two-factor code is invalid.
two_factor.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
two_factor.expired_body: Your sign-in attempt timed out for security. Please sign in again with your email and password.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.map_key_missing: Set VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY in .env to load the map.

merchants.list_subtitle: Onboarded companies and their pilot status across the platform.
merchants.search_placeholder: Search by name, CR, VAT or contact email
merchants.empty_state: No merchants match the current filters.

delete.title: Delete merchant?
delete.message: {name} will be moved to the deleted state. All audit history is preserved. The merchant must have no active branches or devices to be deleted — clean those up first.

branches.title: Branches
branches.subtitle: Every branch belonging to this merchant.
branches.empty: No branches added for this merchant yet.

devices.title: Devices
devices.subtitle: Every device currently assigned to this merchant.
devices.empty: No devices assigned to this merchant yet.

assign.title: Assign device
assign.terminal_help: The terminal id issued by the bank for this merchant's account.
assign.no_unassigned: There are no unassigned devices in the pool. Register a device first.

portal_users.title: Merchant portal users
portal_users.subtitle: Create the initial admin user for this merchant's portal. They get full access — they can then create scoped staff users from inside the portal themselves.

create.title: Create merchant admin user
create.subtitle: Enter the user's name and email. A one-time password will be generated and shown to you next — share it with them securely. They can change it on first login.
create.name: Full name
create.disabled_reason: This merchant needs at least one branch and one assigned device before you can create an admin user.

password_modal.title: Account created
password_modal.subtitle: Share this one-time password with {name} ({email}) via a secure channel. They can change it from their profile after first login.
password_modal.one_shot_warning: This password will only be shown once. Save or share it now — it cannot be retrieved later.

wizard.title: New merchant onboarding
wizard.subtitle: Capture the Oman-compliant company profile, then assign business activities.
wizard.owners_help: Add every legal owner of the merchant. Partnerships and family businesses often have more than one. Exactly one owner must be marked as the primary contact of record.
wizard.activities_help: Select all activities this merchant operates. Mark one as primary.

errors.exactly_one_primary: Exactly one owner must be marked as primary.
errors.validation_summary: Some fields need attention. Please review the form.

documents.reject_prompt: Why is this document being rejected?

commission.title: Commission profile
commission.subtitle: How every sale on this merchant's devices is split. Add the platform, the bank, and any other parties — the merchant keeps whatever remains of 100%.
commission.active_hint: When off, the merchant keeps 100% and no per-sale breakdown is recorded.
commission.label: Label
commission.empty: No parties yet — the merchant keeps 100% of every sale.
commission.over_limit: The parties' combined commission exceeds 100%. Lower a percentage — the merchant takes the remainder.
commission.load_error: Could not load the commission profile.
commission.save_error: Could not save the commission profile.

branches.list_subtitle: Physical locations across all merchants. The branch coordinates set here become the authoritative geo-fence for every assigned device.
branches.search_placeholder: Search by name, code, or manager
branches.empty_state: No branches match the current filters.

delete.title: Delete branch?
delete.message: {name} will be moved to the deleted state. The branch's audit history is kept. Devices assigned to it must be unassigned or decommissioned first.

form.subtitle_create: Identify the branch, set its geo-fence, and pick the default order surface its POS terminals open to.
form.subtitle_edit: Coordinates and geo-fence updates take effect on the next device sync.
form.company_required: Select the merchant this branch belongs to.
form.geofence_help: POS devices outside this radius (plus a small jitter buffer) refuse to accept new orders.
form.default_order_help: Pre-selected on the POS top bar when an operator opens a new ticket.
form.validation_summary: Some fields need attention. Please review the form.

devices.list_subtitle: Every physical terminal, handheld, and customer tablet across the platform. Register a new device once scalefusion has enrolled it, then assign it to a merchant branch.
devices.search_placeholder: Search by serial, kiosk id, name, or label
devices.empty_state: No devices match the current filters.

decommission_dialog.title: Decommission device?
decommission_dialog.message: {label} will be removed from the active fleet permanently: any open assignment is closed, status flips to Blocked, and the device disappears from the platform. Audit history is preserved.

overview.no_assignment: This device has not been assigned to a branch yet.

form.subtitle_register: Enter the scalefusion kiosk id and the device class. Assignment to a merchant branch is a separate step after registration.
form.subtitle_edit: Update the device's identity, hardware, commission profile, and organization. Assignment to a branch is managed separately.
form.kiosk_help: Get this from the scalefusion admin console once the device is enrolled.
form.terminal_help: The permanent identifier the acquiring bank uses for this device (numeric or alphanumeric).
form.commission_profile_help: Used by the donation-split calculation when card payments land.
form.organization_help: The beneficiary organization this device's card round-up donations go to.
form.bank_help: The acquiring bank that issued this terminal. Combined with the terminal id, this routes payment reconciliation back to the right merchant.
form.type_help: Drives the POS app layout — terminals get the customer-facing screen, handhelds don't.
form.label_help: Optional admin-friendly label like POS-001 or HAND-A03.
form.model_help: Pick the specific hardware model. New entries can be added in Settings → Device catalog.
form.catalogue_empty_hint: No device makes exist yet. Add at least one make + model in the Device catalogue before registering a device.
form.validation_summary: Some fields need attention. Please review the form.

activation.title: Activation code
activation.subtitle: Hand this one-shot code to the floor tech. They enter it on the Android tablet to bind it to this device — after that, the tablet syncs the menu and is ready to take orders.
activation.warning_one_shot: Copy or write down this code now. It is shown ONCE and disappears when you close this dialog.

assign.title: Assign device
assign.subtitle: Pick a merchant and one of their branches. The device will be bound to that branch's geo-fence on its next sync.
assign.geofence_help: Leave empty to inherit the branch's current radius. Override only when this device needs a different fence than the others at the same branch.
assign.required: Both merchant and branch are required.

unassign.title: Unassign device
unassign.subtitle: Closes the current assignment. The device drops back to the fleet pool and can be assigned to a new branch later.
unassign.reason_placeholder: e.g. Branch closed, device recalled for repair…

scalefusion.title: Live device
scalefusion.subtitle: Live telemetry + remote control from Scalefusion, joined by kiosk id.
scalefusion.unreachable: Could not reach Scalefusion for this device.
scalefusion.not_enrolled: This device has no kiosk id, so it is not enrolled in Scalefusion.
scalefusion.no_temp: Temperature data is not available yet.
scalefusion.no_ram: RAM usage data is not available yet.
scalefusion.no_storage: Storage usage data is not available yet.
scalefusion.confirm_message: Send “{action}” to this device? It affects the real device immediately.
scalefusion.no_route: No route points recorded for this date.

business_activities.list_subtitle: The catalogue of activities merchants choose from when onboarding. Add new entries, deactivate stale ones, or edit the names and descriptions here.
business_activities.empty_state: No business activities match the current filters.
business_activities.confirm_delete: Delete this business activity? This cannot be undone.

fields.is_active: Active — visible in the merchant create wizard

device_catalog.title: Device catalogue
device_catalog.subtitle: The list of manufacturers and the models they offer. These power the cascading Make → Model dropdowns on the Register Device page.
device_catalog.confirm_delete_make: Delete this make? This cannot be undone, and the make must not have any models or registered devices.
device_catalog.confirm_delete_model: Delete this model? This cannot be undone, and no registered device may still reference it.

fields.name: Name
fields.is_active: Active — visible in the Register Device dropdown

form.code_help: Optional short identifier (e.g. P2-MINI) for exports.

makes.title: Makes
makes.subtitle: The manufacturers (Sunmi, PAX, NEXGO …).
makes.empty: No makes yet — add one to populate the Register Device form.

models.title: Models
models.subtitle: Specific hardware products from the selected make.
models.pick_a_make: Select a make on the left to see its models.
models.empty: No models for this make yet.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure platform-level defaults that apply across every merchant and device.
settings.empty_state: No settings have been seeded yet. Run `php artisan db:seed --class=SettingsSeeder` to install the defaults.

team.title: Platform Team
team.subtitle: Manage MITHQAL staff with access to this admin portal.
team.empty_state: No platform admins match the current filters.

invite.title: Invite a new platform admin
invite.subtitle: Create an account and assign a role. A one-time password will be generated and shown to you to share securely.

password_modal.title: Account created
password_modal.subtitle: Share this one-time password with {name} ({email}) via a secure channel. They should change it on first login.
password_modal.one_shot_warning: This password will only be shown once. Save or share it now — it cannot be retrieved later.

dashboard.title: POS Admin Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Live counts and activity across every merchant, branch, and device on the platform.

tiles.activity_change: Latest admin actions on the platform.

dashboard.fleet_status_subtitle: Where every registered device is in the assignment lifecycle, plus live heartbeat health.
dashboard.device_donut_subtitle: Snapshot of every device by current state.
dashboard.recent_merchants_subtitle: Last five merchants added to the platform.

sales.title: Platform sales
sales.subtitle: Paid orders across every merchant — last 30 days.

audit_log.title: Audit Log
audit_log.subtitle: Every meaningful action across the platform is recorded here for compliance review and incident forensics.
audit_log.empty_state: No audit entries match the current filters.

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.subtitle: Define which platform features each role can access, then assign roles to your platform team.
roles.system_hint: System roles ship with MITHQAL. You can edit which permissions they hold but can't rename or delete them.
roles.delete_blocked_hint: Re-assign the users holding this role before deleting it.

editor.system_role_hint: This is a system role — the name cannot be changed but you can edit which permissions it holds.

delete_dialog.title: Delete role?
delete_dialog.body: The role "{name}" will be removed. This cannot be undone.

geography.list_subtitle: Manage the shared country, region, district and city catalogue that branches are pinned to.
geography.pick_parent: Choose a parent above to view and add items.
geography.confirm_delete: Delete this item? This cannot be undone.

bank_reconciliation.title: Bank reconciliation
bank_reconciliation.subtitle: Upload a bank settlement sheet and reconcile it against the POS card payments by terminal + auth code.
bank_reconciliation.empty: Pick a bank, a statement date, and a settlement file, then generate the preview.

fields.file_hint: Bank Dhofar = .xlsx (sheet "Table 1"); Oman Arab Bank = .csv. The parser is chosen by the bank.

buckets.missing: On the sheet but not in POS
buckets.db_only: POS card payments not on the sheet

orders.title: Sales / Orders
orders.subtitle: Every order across all merchants. Filter by date, merchant, or status.

pending_recon.title: Pending Reconciliation
pending_recon.subtitle: Sales whose Soft POS card charge was force-recorded after an ambiguous result (e.g. NFC timeout). Review them daily against the bank file and approve each once the money is confirmed.
pending_recon.banner: Approving an order confirms the money arrived: its tenders are marked settled, the platform/bank/merchant commission split is recorded, and any charity round-up is forwarded to the charity app. These effects were deferred at sale time and fire only on approval.
pending_recon.load_failed: Failed to load the pending reconciliation queue.
pending_recon.no_rows: No pending reconciliations on this day.
pending_recon.approved_notice: {count} order(s) approved — commission recorded and round-ups forwarded.
pending_recon.approved_with_forward_failures: {count} order(s) approved, but {failures} round-up forward(s) failed — they stay queued for a retry.
pending_recon.reject_message: Mark order {order}'s pending tender ({amount} OMR) as money never arrived? The tender will be recorded as FAILED and no commission or charity forwarding will ever fire for it.
pending_recon.reject_note: This does not void the order — the sale must be voided or re-charged through the normal order flows. This action only records that the money never arrived.
pending_recon.rejected_notice: Payment rejected — recorded as never arrived.

settlements.title: Settlements
settlements.subtitle: Per-merchant commission breakdown and platform totals over the selected window — the money owed to each merchant plus the platform's own revenue.

payouts.section_subtitle: Settlement payouts created for the selected window. Pending payouts can be marked paid or cancelled. Expand a payout for its per-branch breakdown.

lines.empty: No branch detail for this payout.

payouts.cancel_message: Cancel this payout and release its sales back to unsettled? This cannot be undone.
payouts.nothing_to_pay: Nothing unsettled to pay in this period.

commission.section_subtitle: Reconcile each merchant's card sales against the bank's actual fee. Card commission is estimated until settled here — that's where the merchant's exact net is finalised.
commission.nothing_to_settle: No unsettled card sales for this merchant in the selected window.
commission.actual_bank_hint: From the bank statement. Defaults to the estimate — adjust up or down; the merchant's net absorbs the difference.
commission.reverse_message: Reverse this settlement and return its sales to the estimate? They can then be re-settled. This is blocked if the sales have already been paid out.

reconcile.title: Order reconciliation
reconcile.empty: No unsettled card sales for this branch in the selected dates.
reconcile.pay_out_blocked: Settle all the orders above first, then pay out.

simple.title: Settlements
simple.subtitle: Each day: pick a merchant, then a branch, check its card sales against the bank, fix any fee, then pay out.
simple.nothing_to_settle: Nothing to settle for these dates.

roundup_report.title: Round-Up Donations
roundup_report.subtitle: Per-merchant charity round-up totals over the selected window — how much each merchant's customers rounded up to charity.
roundup_report.no_rows: No round-up donations in this window.

security.title: Account Security
security.subtitle: Manage how you sign in to the platform console.

two_factor.title: Two-factor authentication
two_factor.subtitle: Add a second step to your sign-in with an authenticator app.
two_factor.disabled_body: Protect your account with time-based one-time codes (TOTP). After your password, you will be asked for a 6-digit code from an app like Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, or 1Password.
two_factor.scan_hint: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, or enter the secret manually. Then type the 6-digit code the app shows to confirm.
two_factor.enabled_notice: Two-factor authentication is now enabled for your account.
two_factor.recovery_note: Store these one-time codes somewhere safe (a password manager). Each works once if you lose access to your authenticator app. They will NOT be shown again.
two_factor.enabled_body: Your account asks for a 6-digit authenticator code at every sign-in. Disabling removes that protection.
two_factor.disable_note: To disable, confirm your password plus a current authenticator code (or one unused recovery code).
two_factor.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
